name: White Chocolate Mousse Cheesecake with Sun-Dried Cherries
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Caramel DeLite Cookies, diced and crumbled
4 oz Shortbread Cookies, diced and crumbled
4 oz Praline Royale Cookies, diced and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white chocolate.
2. Dissolve the gelatin in 1 ounce of water.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Beat on medium speed for 10 minutes until smooth.
4. Add the melted white chocolate and dissolved gelatin to the cream cheese mixture. Continue beating for two more minutes.
5. Gently fold in the whipped cream and sun-dried cherries until well combined.
6. To assemble, grease a 10-inch mold with butter.
7. Pour the Caramel DeLite cookie crumbles onto the bottom of the mold.
8. Spread the cheesecake mixture over the first layer of cookies.
9. Sprinkle the Praline Royale cookie mixture on top.
10. Alternate adding more cheese and cookie layers until the mold is filled.
